new_terms.context: Power delivery infrastructure evolution for high-density AI server racks.
Energy storage components used for power stability in hyperscale data centers.
Used for peak shaving and short-term power stability in high-power racks.
Advanced power conversion technology used to increase transmission efficiency.
The practice of using BBU/CBU capacity to manage peak power demand.
Cables delivering high-ampere three-phase power (e.g., 100A whips) to the rack.
Busbar design for VR NVL72 to handle high current without fan-based cooling.
Individual units within the power shelf that convert AC to DC.
